description: After a well has been drilled to total depth, a geologist plans a wireline logging job to get high-resolution data about the formations.

nodes.task_description: Select the suite of wireline logging tools to be run based on the data objectives (e.g., formation imaging, fluid sampling).

expected_outcome.value: A list of required logging tools is finalized.

nodes.task_description: Create a detailed logging program, specifying the order of tool runs and the depth intervals to be logged.

expected_outcome.value: A formal logging program document is created.

nodes.task_description: Order the wireline logging services from a service company and coordinate their arrival at the rig site.

expected_outcome.value: The service company is booked, and their mobilization is scheduled.
